_meta.source: allo_analytics.call_analyses (AI call audit) × exotel_calls(lead_to_call) — clinic tag from audit locality; bucketed by CALL time (ec.start_time), not analysis date
_meta.available_from: audit backfilled historical calls (~late Apr on); bucketing by call time avoids the analysis-date pile-up. Weeks with thin coverage may under-count.
_meta.fields: lead_calls=inbound lead calls placed at this clinic by the AI locality; relevant=service-intent; strong=STRONG intent; by_cat=diagnosis category (level-2 layer)
